problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Combining Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
